cases.input: Generate a QA report from complete validation outputs with one critical security finding and two warnings.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces exact 3-line TLDR, reconciled counts, all findings, category status, top recommendations, validation, and risks.

cases.input: Generate a QA report where every source run passed with zero findings.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a clean report with zero counts, PASS categories, and no invented issues.

cases.input: Generate a report from structure and manifest only; security and content quality were not run.
cases.expected_behavior: Labels source coverage partial and lists missing dimensions as coverage gaps.

cases.input: Include a finding with severity BLOCKER.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects unknown severity and requires CRITICAL, WARNING, or INFO.

cases.input: Claim two critical findings while only one critical finding is listed.

cases.expected_behavior: Rejects TLDR that is not exactly three lines.

cases.input: Rank recommendations 1 and 3 with no rank 2.
Run a new security audit of this codebase.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not treat a new audit request as QA report generation; it asks for source validation outputs or routes to audit skills.
